verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the rule immediately, "never change the meaning of an existing contract; only add to it"; B starts with softer setup, "Here's a battle-tested plan".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits faster to one default: "default to URL path versioning"; B also recommends URI path but spends more time surveying variants.
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: "This dir (`/private/tmp`) isn't a repo"; none comparable in A.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it adds defaults for unversioned requests, migration guides, specific linters, usage metrics, and brownout tests.
